description: Automate a parameter sweep to evaluate demand sensitivity for the Bologna Pasubio scenario using the configuration file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg. Run headless simulations for demand scale values of 0.8, 0.9, 1.0, 1.1, and 1.2 without random seeds. For each scale, generate a statistics output file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/stats_<scale>.xml. Extract the average 'timeLoss' from the '<vehicleTripStatistics>' element and compile a final report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/demand_sensitivity.csv with columns 'Scale' and 'Average_TimeLoss'.
